title: hypericum assamicum
intro: Hypericum assamicum, also known as a species of St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to the northeastern region of India, particularly in the state of Assam. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hypericum assamicum include its ability to treat mild depression, anxiety, and sleep disorders, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Hypericum assamicum include tea, tincture, and topical creams, which can be used internally or externally to harness its medicinal properties.
